observed_issues.label: Desk crowded into corner limits movement
observed_issues.evidence: The desk and dual monitors are pushed tightly into the corner with minimal clearance around the office chair

observed_issues.label: Heavy curtain blocks all natural light
observed_issues.evidence: Floor-to-ceiling grey curtain completely covers what appears to be a window, creating artificial lighting dependency

observed_issues.label: Sleep and work zones uncomfortably close
observed_issues.evidence: Bed with yellow cover is immediately adjacent to office setup with no visual separation

observed_issues.label: Visible cables around desk area
observed_issues.evidence: Multiple cables visible running from monitors and equipment on the black desk surface

observed_issues.label: Items scattered on floor near bed
observed_issues.evidence: Headphones and miscellaneous items visible on the floor beside the bed

mood_suggestion.reason: A calming palette would help reduce visual stress in this multifunctional small space where work and rest compete
